title: lithocarpus ovalis
intro: Lithocarpus ovalis, also known as the boxnut or Taiwan boxnut, is a species of evergreen tree native to Taiwan. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are known to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus ovalis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used to make tonics and extracts for the treatment of various ailments.
